mapper.insert: insert into osh_course_question ( course_id, section_id, user_id, question_id, parent_id, record_type, title, content, solve_status, accepted_answer_id, reply_count, last_reply_time, status, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{courseId}, #{sectionId}, #{userId}, #{questionId}, #{parentId}, #{recordType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{solveStatus}, #{acceptedAnswerId}, #{replyCount}, #{lastReplyTime}, #{status}, #{deleteFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: select id, course_id, section_id, user_id, question_id, parent_id, record_type, title, content, solve_status, accepted_answer_id, reply_count, last_reply_time, status, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from osh_course_question where id = #{id} and delete_flag = 0

select id, course_id, section_id, user_id, title, content, solve_status, reply_count, last_reply_time, create_time from osh_course_question where course_id = #{courseId} and section_id = #{sectionId} and record_type = 1 and delete_flag = 0 and status = 1 order by create_time desc
select id, question_id, user_id, content, create_time from osh_course_question where question_id = #{questionId} and record_type = 2 and delete_flag = 0 and status = 1 order by create_time asc
mapper.update: update osh_course_question set reply_count = reply_count + 1, last_reply_time = #{lastReplyTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{lastReplyTime} where id = #{questionId} and delete_flag = 0
mapper.select: select count(1) from osh_course_question where section_id = #{sectionId} and delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: insert into osh_course_question ( course_id, section_id, user_id, title, content, status, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{courseId}, #{sectionId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
